Title: User Registration with Valid Data
Test Data:
- Email: testuser@example.com
- Password: P@ssw0rd
- Name: John Doe
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the registration button.
2. User fills in the registration form with valid data.
3. User submits the form.
4. UI validates the input data.
5. UI sends the registration request to FirebaseAuthentication.
6. FirebaseAuthentication validates the data.
7. FirebaseAuthentication saves the user data to FirebaseStore.
8. FirebaseStore confirms the save operation.
9. FirebaseAuthentication returns the authentication token to the UI.
10. UI confirms the successful registration and displays the token.
Expected Result: Registration is successful, and the user receives an authentication token.
